title: The Return of Wild Bill
writer: Robert Lee Johnson, Fred Myton, Walter J. Coburn
actors: Bill Elliott, Iris Meredith, George Lloyd
plot: To get possession of choice ranch lands, Matt and Jake Kilgore frame Sam Griffin for stealing cattle from Lige Saunders, set themselves up as vigilantes and then hang him. Then they urge Ol' Mitch, who has taken in Griffin's daugh...
